summary: End-to-end test of Shobha Healthcare backend + frontend (first iteration). 16/16 pytest backend tests passed. Frontend home renders all sections (utility bar, header nav, hero carousel with 3 slides + clickable indicators, trust strip, what-we-do 5 cards, why-shobha, global presence, ghana stats, founder section, partners marquee, testimonials, final CTA, contact form, footer). Contact form POST creates inquiry (200, email_sent=false as expected since RESEND_API_KEY is empty) and shows 'Inquiry received' success state. Admin login → /admin dashboard with KPI cards, /admin/inquiries lists submitted inquiry, /admin/products lists 8 seeded products, /admin/content shows editable hero/trust/ghana/founder fields. Protected admin routes correctly redirect to /admin/login when token is cleared.

minor.issue: Accepts status_value as query param instead of JSON body — works but inconsistent with REST norms
Accepts arbitrary dict payload (no Pydantic validation) — allows extra/malformed fields to be persisted
Uses deprecated @app.on_event; should migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI 0.110+)

allow_credentials=True combined with default allow_origins=['*'] is rejected by browsers when a Cookie/Auth header is sent cross-site. Currently no impact because JWT is via Bearer, but should set explicit origins via CORS_ORIGINS env.

issues: Inputs lack name and data-testid attributes (only ordinal-based selectors work); harms accessibility (no <label for>) and automated testing reliability
Logo SVG appears very small/cropped in admin sidebar — verify /brand/shobha-logo.svg sizing inside AdminLayout

action_items: Add name and data-testid attributes to all ContactSection form fields (full_name, company, country, email, phone, inquiry_type, message) for testability and accessibility.
Add a Pydantic model for PUT /api/content/homepage payload validation.
Switch PATCH /api/inquiries/{id} to accept {status} in JSON body instead of query param.
Migrate @app.on_event startup/shutdown to FastAPI lifespan handler.
Set explicit CORS_ORIGINS (preview + production) and avoid '*' with allow_credentials=True.
Verify the admin sidebar logo rendering (appears cropped in screenshots) and improve KPI section data-testid coverage on dashboard cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend: ContactSection form fields are unlabeled at the DOM level (no name, no data-testid, no aria-label) — both an a11y and QA concern.
Backend: PUT /api/content/homepage stores any client-supplied dict verbatim under key='homepage' — a misbehaving admin client could corrupt the document shape consumed by the public homepage.

Backend: HTTPBearer(auto_error=False) + manual 401 in get_current_admin is fine, but rejects missing tokens with detail='Not authenticated' rather than a structured error model; consider standardizing error responses.
Backend: bcrypt hash format verified ($2b$ via gensalt). Seed admin is idempotent and re-hashes password if env value changes. Good.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed inquiries (3 visible in admin: TEST_UI Submitter, TEST_John Doe, Test User). Product/content tests create-then-delete or restore so no residue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend stack: FastAPI + Motor + JWT (Bearer), seeds admin/homepage/8 products on startup. RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty → email_sent=false on inquiries. Frontend stores JWT in localStorage key 'shobha_token' and uses axios interceptor (/app/frontend/src/lib/api.js). Admin routes: /admin (dashboard), /admin/inquiries, /admin/products, /admin/content, /admin/login. Contact form inputs are positional (no name/data-testid) — use indexed selectors (#contact input[0]=name, [3]=email, textarea=message). Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health, content, products CRUD, inquiries lifecycle, auth.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing behaviour observed in this iteration.
